variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of revenues appears in the operating-section excerpt. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A/overhead appears in the operating-section excerpt. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'General & Admin', so nothing should be added separately.
